name: Ningxia Building Materials Group Co.,Ltd
summary: Ningxia Building Materials Group Co.,Ltd manufactures and sells cement, cement clinkers, commercial concrete, and related cement products in China. The compnoffers dam and oil well cement; and ordinary, composite, slag, fly ash, road, medium-low-heat, and sulfate-resistant Portland cement under the Saima, Qingtongxia, Shuanglu, Liupanshan, Ningzhongning, and Grassland brands. The company was formerly known as Ningxia Saima Industry Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Ningxia Building Materials Group Co.,Ltd in December 2011. Ningxia Building Materials Group Co.,Ltd was founded in 1998 and is based in Yinchuan, China.
